name: Gathering of Nations Powwow
traditions: Competitive dancing (fancy, jingle, grass, traditional); drumming and singing; Indian Trader's Market; Miss Indian World pageant.
historicalBackground: The Gathering of Nations began in 1983 and has grown into North America's largest powwow, bringing together over 700 tribes.
description: North America's largest powwow, uniting over 700 Native American and Indigenous nations in spectacular competitive dance and song.
